name: Xiezhong International Holdings Limited
summary: Xiezhong International Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the designing, production, and sale of automotive heating, ventilation, and cooling (HVAC) systems for sport utility vehicles, pickup trucks, sedans, and heavy trucks in Mainland China, the Kingdom of Morocco, France, Spain, and Slovakia. The company operates in two segments, HVAC Business and 4S Dealership Business. The company offers HVAC components, including evaporators, condensers, heater cores, radiators, intercoolers, oil coolers, and HVAC hoses and housings, as well as technical testing and related services. It also supplies HVAC systems and HVAC components for new energy vehicles and construction machinery, as well as other vehicles, such as light trucks and buses. In addition, the company engages in the sale of automobiles and automobile components, and spare parts and accessories, as well as provision of after-sales services, such as repair and maintenance services. Xiezhong International Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.
